title: geissois ternata var. serrata
intro: Geissois ternata var. serrata, also known as the New Zealand tōtara, is a species of tree native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The extracts from the plant have been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The herbal preparations of Geissois ternata var. serrata typically involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical applications for medicinal purposes.
